name: Waste, loss, or leakage is unexplained
description: The venue is seeing avoidable loss, comp, or waste movement without a clean explanation, containment rule, or review cadence.
source_ref: universal-signal-gold-set-01: waste, loss, or leakage unexplained expressed through restaurant commercial controls
evidence_types: waste or shrink increases without explanation
void or comp movement is visible but not understood
loss shows up without review or ownership
